---
title: "All indicators"
---

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

{{< include _view-toggle.qmd >}}

## Labor

::: {.chart-grid .view-stacked}
{{< include _charts-labor.qmd >}}
:::

## Consumers

::: {.chart-grid .view-stacked}
{{< include _charts-consumers.qmd >}}
:::

## Travel

::: {.chart-grid .view-stacked}
{{< include _charts-travel.qmd >}}
:::

## Public health

::: {.chart-grid .view-stacked}
{{< include _charts-health.qmd >}}
:::

## Markets

::: {.chart-grid .view-stacked}
{{< include _charts-markets.qmd >}}
:::


{{< include _footer.qmd >}}
